records.reason: Missing Stay.ai final state for cancel request

metric_definitions: Follow-up queue includes records with pending confirmation, portal completion unknown, or low trust.
Stay.ai confirmation is required for final save/cancel truth.
Portal link sent does not imply portal completion.

presentation.executive_summary: Follow-up queue prioritizes cases needing human action with source-truth-safe status fields.
presentation.comparison_label: Comparison baseline unavailable in fixture preview
presentation.source_authority_explanation: Stay.ai is the authoritative source for final subscription outcomes.
presentation.trust_explanation: Trust is medium because confirmations are still pending for part of the queue.
presentation.freshness_explanation: Data is fresh and within expected recency.
presentation.drilldown_hint: Use owner_queue and sla_status to triage support workloads.
presentation.empty_state_copy: No eligible records were available for this calculation window.
presentation.blocked_state_copy: This metric is blocked until Stay.ai confirmation records are available.
